hero.tagline: AI is Air, Not a Button.
hero.subtitle: Jellyfin for videos. Immich for photos.
hero.description: Self-hosted book library where AI is woven into every surface. You never "open AI" — you just read, and the experience is transformed.

features.sectionTitle: AI changes everything, but you can’t point to where it is

companion.title: Reading Companion
companion.desc: A TARS-style AI partner — adjust personality, style, depth, warmth

ambient.title: Ambient Intelligence
ambient.desc: Context bar, inline glossary, margin notes — AI speaks, you listen

insights.title: Insight, Not Statistics
insights.desc: AI narrates your reading journey — knowledge network, cross-book connections

tts.title: TTS Audiobooks
tts.desc: Turn any ebook into audiobook — your companion’s voice reads to you

library.title: Smart Library
library.desc: Auto-tagging, summaries, semantic search — import a book, it’s ready

privacy.title: Privacy as Freedom
privacy.desc: Hidden library with biometric access — zero trace, full AI inside

quadrant.sectionTitle: The only AI-native self-hosted book library
